name: Security RMF User Activity Response Worker
description: Detects suspicious user activity, recommends safe step-up authentication, and generates RMF/ATO/cATO-ready evidence artifacts.

metadata.name: Security RMF User Activity Response Worker
metadata.description: Detects suspicious user activity, recommends safe step-up authentication, and generates RMF/ATO/cATO-ready evidence artifacts.
metadata.target_user: Security-conscious SaaS, GovTech, defense-tech, compliance, and platform teams.
metadata.problem_solved: User activity streams need stateful triage, safe response instructions, and audit-ready evidence tied to source events.
metadata.customizable_for: Identity provider events, SaaS audit logs, GitHub audit logs, CloudTrail, and internal application activity streams.

safety.compliance_claim: candidate evidence only; no formal authorization claim
